summary.zhCN: 从文本中移除 emoji 字形。

description.original: Remove emoji glyphs from text. Agent-OPT ships this as a first-party in-process Web plugin surface with capability-configured Web controls, deterministic validation, and no external network or credentials. It is not counted as an upstream MCP server.
description.zhCN: 从文本中移除 emoji 字形。 Agent-OPT 将其作为一等公民的进程内 MCP 兼容工具面：专属 Web 控件、确定性校验，且不访问外网、不需要凭证。 ?????? MCP Server ???

evidence.note: First-party in-process plugin implementation for slug local-emoji-strip with tools: strip_emoji
Adapter registration wires the local MCP catalog into the shared invoke path used by Web and tests.

license.evidence: First-party Agent-OPT code under the repository MIT license; no third-party package redistribution required.

description.original: Local plugin tool strip_emoji executed in-process.
description.zhCN: 进程内执行本地 MCP 工具 strip_emoji。

notes: In-process first-party plugin surface; no child process, host FS, or network access.
Inputs are schema-validated and size-bounded before execution.
First-party local plugin with a capability-configured Web form and bounded in-process adapter.
It is intentionally classified as plugin, not mcp-server, because it does not expose an MCP protocol transport.
Verification remains not-run until the current Vitest matrix and a real per-slug Chromium workflow pass.
Chinese name/summary reviewed for the local MCP catalog entry.

tests.evidence: local-emoji-strip: all exposed tools ran through invokePluginTool with valid fixtures and returned non-error content plus structuredContent; the matrix covered 42 plugins and 51 tools.
local-emoji-strip: every exposed tool completed through the real Next POST /api/plugins/[slug]/invoke handler with HTTP 200 and the expected plugin identity.
local-emoji-strip: every tool rejected a non-object payload, unknown tools were rejected, representative semantic failures were controlled, and the HTTP route returned 400 for invalid input.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=local-plugins.spec.ts › first-party local MCP browser coverage › @web-e2e [local-emoji-strip] runs every UI tool and renders a controlled failure; route=/plugins/local-emoji-strip; result=passed
local-emoji-strip: registration asserted in-process mode; manifest permissions remain filesystem/network/commands none with no secrets or external accounts.
